calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-20-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lauren Jones, via Zoom, for James Pratt, Administrator.

The court advises counsel of its position regarding the issue of the argument regarding extraordinary fees and that the court is bound by the legislature to only allow extraordinary fees for extraordinary work performed. Counsel offers testimony in support of her request for extraordinary fees. The court summarizes which extraordinary fees it intends to allow.

The matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Cecilia Castellanos. Examiner: Sandra Hilton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-15-2022 Continued To Jul-19-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar May-10-2022 Continued To Jun-15-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Feb-07-2022 Off Calendar

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Nov-22-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lauren Jones, via ZOOM, for James Pratt, Administrator.

The court asks counsel if Ms. Pitchford has directed that her attorney receive notice on her behalf. Counsel reports that she recently filed a declaration to address most of the Examiner's notes and plans to file a new declaration soon to address the preceding and notes that Ms. Pitchford had been served via mail on Jul-01-2021. Counsel reports that the matter with Ms. Pitchford settled and the Administrator does not plan on selling the real property. There is a pending appraisal and once the appraisal is complete and received from the probate referee, this matter should be ready to close. The court advises counsel that it is taking the matter under submission with the intent to grant an extension of time to administer this estate to Feb-07-2022.

The Accounting Status Petition is submitted.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
